reviews.text: Heather is a visionary! We chose her because we fell in love with her editing style. Little did we know we found a true gem. She is kind, charismatic, and supportive; the exact person you want by your side on your wedding day. Heather was prepared for anything and knew how to capture the most precious moments. She knows how to get the crowd going to transform your photos from perfectly nice group shots to expressive, vibrant, fun, and freeing photos. My husband and I highly recommend her for any photography needs that you may have.

I cannot express enough good things about Heather. We found her because she had done pictures for a friends previous wedding and we were not disappointed. She’s an absolute BADASS at what she does and creates true art. She handled difficult family members and wedding guests like a champ, pushed to have exactly what we imagined and captured our day that quite literally made me cry reimagining our day. She captured so many of my favorite moments and  made me feel so beautiful. I would rehire her in a minute and will 100% hire her for future big life events. She’s an amazing person, inside and out and made me and my husband feel so comfortable and free to be ourselves in both our wedding and engagement pictures. Every time I look at the pictures I get emotional because of how well she captured the day. Amazing photographer and an even more amazing person. HIRE her immediately, you will not be disappointed. Heather, we love you, THANK YOU.
-your biggest fans

Heather is an absolute dream! She will be your teammate and champion through the whole wedding planning process and especially on the wedding day. We were drawn to Heather’s work because we could tell how much joy, energy and fun that she brought to the couples she worked with. We love that the photos of our wedding capture the emotions of the day so completely. We had never had professional photos before and Heather made us feel super comfortable and at ease. We are obsessed with the incredible gallery that Heather delivered and we are obsessed with Heather as a person. She is the best!! Thank you Heather we love you!!

If I could give Heather 1000 stars I would! We first heard about Heather from a friend of a friend who gave her a glowing review after she took their wedding photos and when my husband and I finally started to plan our small wedding/elopement and look for photographers, we decided to check her out. Knowing a photographer is a big expense we looked at other reviews, looked around and then decided out of all the options we should send Heather a message and I am so, SO thankful we did. She helped us plan out our schedule (and kept everyone on track day off!), went to look for nearby locations for our newlywed portraits, and was willing to help us find any vendor we could have needed. On the day of the wedding she was I think everyone’s favorite part of the day! Everyone absolutely loved her and she was just amazing at making everyone comfortable and getting everyone out of their shells. She made everything easy for us.
On a more vulnerable note, I’m incredibly shy and I have never been comfortable having pictures taken of myself. I’m a pretty tough self-critic and I was pretty dang nervous to have wedding pictures taken because I was scared I would hate them all. Not only did Heather actually make posing fun and comfortable and easy, but I actually loved every single photo she took of my husband and I and our family and that is something I could never thank her enough for.
If you’re thinking about hiring Heather as your photographer, just know that she is worth every single penny a million times over. She is funny, and welcoming, confident, comforting and every good quality in between. She was the best part of our wedding (minus the marriage part) and if I had to do it all again I would choose her in a heartbeat.

I asked Heather to take my senior pictures and she did better than I could’ve ever imagined! She knew the perfect locations, and timed it perfectly to when the lighting was AMAZING. I was a bit nervous going into the shoot, because getting your picture taken can definitely feel awkward, but Heather made it such a fun and comfortable space! Her creativity and enthusiasm really made this the best experience ever. Not just the shoot was 10/10 though, but after, I received my pictures very quickly! Also, the editing of the pictures, the aesthetics, and the platform she uses to share was all SO GOOD. Heather literally looked at my inspo pictures and did exactly that but better!

All in all, my family and I HIGHLY recommend Heather! She’s just simply the best at what she does, and overall an amazing person to partner with! I think it’s a good sign when my mom cries looking at the pictures haha:)
